nat_upnp_context(3) Library Functions Manual nat_upnp_context(3)

NAME

nat_upnp_context - Handle to UPnP context.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/network/nat/upnp.h>

Data Fields


char external_ip [16]
Detected external/public IP (e.g., 203.0.113.42"). uint16_t mapped_port
External port that was mapped (may differ from internal). uint16_t internal_port
Internal port we're binding to. char device_description [256]
Device name for logging (e.g., TP-LinkArcherC7"). bool is_natpmp
true if NAT-PMP was used, false if UPnP bool is_mapped
true if port mapping is currently active

Detailed Description

Handle to UPnP context.

Definition at line 25 of file upnp.h.

Field Documentation

char nat_upnp_context::device_description[256]

Device name for logging (e.g., "TP-Link Archer C7").

Detected external/public IP (e.g., "203.0.113.42").

Internal port we're binding to.

true if port mapping is currently active

true if NAT-PMP was used, false if UPnP

Definition at line 30 of file upnp.h.

External port that was mapped (may differ from internal).
